summary: Implemented markdown parsers for task .md files and execution record .md files. ParseTaskFile extracts acceptance criteria, scope, and description using line-by-line heading detection. ParseRecordFile extracts structured sections (Summary, Files, Key Decisions, Test Results) from ## and ### headings. Handles YAML frontmatter scope extraction with quote stripping. Files are parsed from ### Files Created and ### Files Modified sub-sections. Returns empty RecordContent with Raw field populated when no headings found.
keyDecisions: Used simple line-by-line parsing instead of markdown AST library per task spec
parseSections handles both ## (h2) and ### (h3) headings to support real record format where Key Decisions is ### under ## Changes
YAML frontmatter scope extraction strips surrounding quotes with unquote helper
extractFiles uses ### Files Created/### Files Modified sub-sections matching actual record file format

acceptanceCriteria.criterion: Extracts acceptance criteria from ## Acceptance Criteria section (lines starting with - [ ])
ParseRecordFile(filePath string) (*RecordContent, error) parses structured sections
RecordContent fields populated from ## Summary, ## Files Created/Modified, ## Key Decisions, ## Test Results headings
Files field parsed as []string (one path per line)
Returns empty RecordContent with Raw field populated if no headings found
Returns error for missing files (not panic)
Unit tests with sample markdown fixtures: task file with AC, record with all sections, record with no sections, missing file

notes: 19 new parser tests added (6 ParseTaskFile, 11 ParseRecordFile, 2 integration). All 44 scanner tests pass. Scanner package coverage increased from 95.0% to 94.8% (slight decrease due to new parser code with all paths covered but some error branches not tested).
